cases.description: A docs-only candidate is committed in a disposable temporary repository and checked for frozen-path touches plus release-gate cleanliness.
cases.expected_reason: protected verification passed with no frozen-path changes

cases.description: A candidate commit modifies a path listed in origin/main:autolab/frozen_manifest.json and is halted by the adversarial suite preflight before harness execution.
cases.driver: suite preflight over git diff --name-only origin/main...<temp-tamper-commit>

cases.description: A disposable temporary repository contains a forbidden untracked runtime output so release_gate.py --ci rejects the dirty release condition.
A valid candidate packet with a non-PROMOTION_READY outcome is passed to ratification_packet_cli.py --ratify.
A candidate packet missing required fields is passed to ratification_packet_cli.py.
